name: Eltingville club // 01
description:
They can’t stop staring…

This request has been sitting in the bin for a WHILE now… I’m so sorry it took me so long to get to it. Requested by anonymous. I tried my best to fit the description given for users body while staying vague, but I would be happy to make malepov or versions with different body types if it’s not vague enough.

Characters involved:

Bill Dickey, Pete Dinunzio, Josh Levy, Jerry Stokes
